name: @edutive/question-tools
description: Validation tools for Edutive question datasets.

scripts.validate:examples: tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/sample-questions.json && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/sample-questions.csv && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/mathematics/questions.json && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/mathematics/questions.csv && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/science/questions.json && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/science/questions.csv && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/indonesian-language/questions.json && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/indonesian-language/questions.csv && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/english/questions.json && tsx src/cli.ts validate ../../examples/english/questions.csv
